title: Infused Items
description: Made for the ItemSMP the Infused Items mod is made from user submissions and then crafted together to fit into the story line of the server. each item was made by our team to be of the highest possible quality
body:
![Item SMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9181baaf4985547fdf36da7b3bf1007865121d00.png)
## About the ItemSMP

Every player was given the chance to create a **unique item** for the SMP, resulting in a collection of wildly creative and powerful gear. Each item is infused with magic drawn from mysterious **ancient crystals**.

These crystals channel the arcane power of long-forgotten mages into **modern technology and weaponry**, creating tools unlike anything seen before.

## The Lore

The awakening of the crystals came at a terrible cost.

Their power shattered the great shield that once protected the land from **Razarac**, a demon lord now stirring once more. Drawn to the crystals’ energy, Razarac seeks to reclaim their power and finish what was once sealed away.

## What Awaits

- Player-created, one of a kind items  
- Magic infused technology and weapons  
- Deep SMP/Storyline driven lore  
- A looming demonic threat

> **Wield the magic. Shape the future.  
> But be ready for what you’ve unleashed.**

Join our discord for future season of the item smp
